name: David H. Anthony Sr Fitness-Leisure Park
description: David H. Anthony Sr Fitness-Leisure Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hattiesburg, MS. There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Kamper Park
description: Kamper Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hattiesburg, MS. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Lamar County Tennis/Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Lamar County Tennis/Pickleball Complex in Hattiesburg, MS! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Merit Health Wellness Center
description: Merit Health Wellness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hattiesburg, MS. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Temple Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Temple Baptist Church in Hattiesburg, MS! There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
